Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorDropDownMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_BAG_SELECT_SHORTCUT; self.textString = "RIGHT_CLICK;ALT_LEFT_CLICK;ALT_RIGHT_CLICK;SHIFT_LEFT_CLICK;SHIFT_RIGHT_CLICK;DISABLED"; self.valuesString = "right click;alt left click;alt right click;shift left click;shift right click;none"; self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorKeyBindingConfigMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_POST_SHORTCUT; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_POST_SHORTCUT_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CUSTOM_KEYBOARD_SHORTCUTS; self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorKeyBindingConfigMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_SKIP_SHORTCUT; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_POST_SHORTCUT_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CUSTOM_KEYBOARD_SHORTCUTS; self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorKeyBindingConfigMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_PREV_SHORTCUT; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_POST_SHORTCUT_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CUSTOM_KEYBOARD_SHORTCUTS; self:OnLoad()
